title: A to Z My Baby Bella Doll, Pink, 30cm
features: Ideal first baby doll for your toddler
Soft, fibre filled body, arms and legs
It is ideal for children to play, hug and take it anywhere, providing kids with more security and sweet deams.
Suitable for age 18 months and upwards
description: Product Description A To Z My Baby Bella Doll, 30Cm Ideal first baby doll for your toddler. Soft, fibre filled body, arms and legs. Bella's pink clothing may vary from photograph. This doll conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. Please remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 18 months and upwards. With her iconic smile and super soft features, this is the perfect doll for your baby to hug, play and grow with. Made of Class A material, non-toxic, our baby dolls are super soft and skin-friendly, machine washable. Babies can put it in the mouth. Safety Warning For external use only. Box Contains 1 x Baby Bella Doll See more
